revision.comment: Undid revision 1204059315 by [[Special:Contributions/Gonnym|Gonnym]] ([[User talk:Gonnym|talk]]) The whole point of the template is that it replaces a ToC, whether it be at the top in one skin, or on the left in another. Forcetoc is still available.
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compact_TOC here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{allowtoc|}}}||__NOTOC__ }}
{{flatlist}} {{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|no | |
{{{name|{{MediaWiki:Toc}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{side|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|short1|yes}}}}}|yes |: }}
}}
{{#ifeq:{{{top}}}|yes | * [[#top|Top]]}}{{#if:{{{pre1|{{{preSec1|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre1link|{{{preSec1link|#{{{pre1|{{{preSec1}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre1name|{{{preSec1name|{{{pre1|{{{preSec1}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre2|{{{preSec2|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre2link|{{{preSec2link|#{{{pre2|{{{preSec2}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre2name|{{{preSec2name|{{{pre2|{{{preSec2}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre3|{{{preSec3|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre3link|{{{preSec3link|#{{{pre3|{{{preSec3}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre3name|{{{preSec3name|{{{pre3|{{{preSec3}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre4|{{{preSec4|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre4link|{{{preSec4link|#{{{pre4|{{{preSec4}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre4name|{{{preSec4name|{{{pre4|{{{preSec4}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre5|{{{preSec5|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre5link|{{{preSec5link|#{{{pre5|{{{preSec5}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre5name|{{{preSec5name|{{{pre5|{{{preSec5}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre6|{{{preSec6|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre6link|{{{preSec6link|#{{{pre6|{{{preSec6}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre6name|{{{preSec6name|{{{pre6|{{{preSec6}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre7|{{{preSec7|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre7link|{{{preSec7link|#{{{pre7|{{{preSec7}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre7name|{{{preSec7name|{{{pre7|{{{preSec7}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre8|{{{preSec8|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre8link|{{{preSec8link|#{{{pre8|{{{preSec8}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre8name|{{{preSec8name|{{{pre8|{{{preSec8}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre9|{{{preSec9|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre9link|{{{preSec9link|#{{{pre9|{{{preSec9}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre9name|{{{preSec9name|{{{pre9|{{{preSec9}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre10|{{{preSec10|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre10link|{{{preSec10link|#{{{pre10|{{{preSec10}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre10name|{{{preSec10name|{{{pre10|{{{preSec10}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre11|{{{preSec11|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre11link|{{{preSec11link|#{{{pre11|{{{preSec11}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre11name|{{{preSec11name|{{{pre11|{{{preSec11}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{pre12|{{{preSec12|}}}}}} | * [[{{{pre12link|{{{preSec12link|#{{{pre12|{{{preSec12}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{pre12name|{{{preSec12name|{{{pre12|{{{preSec12}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#ifeq:{{{prebreak|}}}|yes|
}} {{#ifeq:{{{sym}}}|yes | * [[#!$@{{{2|}}}|!$@]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{num}}}|yes | {{#if:{{{0-9}}}|* {{{0-9|[[#0–9{{{2|}}}|0–9]]}}} }} }}{{#ifeq:{{{symnum}}}|yes | * [[#!–9{{{2|}}}|!–9]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{letters}}}|no|| {{#if:{{{a}}}|* {{{a|[[#A{{{2|}}}|A]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{b}}}|* {{{b|[[#B{{{2|}}}|B]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{c}}}|* {{{c|[[#C{{{2|}}}|C]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{d}}}|* {{{d|[[#D{{{2|}}}|D]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{e}}}|* {{{e|[[#E{{{2|}}}|E]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{f}}}|* {{{f|[[#F{{{2|}}}|F]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{g}}}|* {{{g|[[#G{{{2|}}}|G]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{h}}}|* {{{h|[[#H{{{2|}}}|H]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{i}}}|* {{{i|[[#I{{{2|}}}|I]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{j}}}|* {{{j|[[#J{{{2|}}}|J]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{k}}}|* {{{k|[[#K{{{2|}}}|K]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{l}}}|* {{{l|[[#L{{{2|}}}|L]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{m}}}|* {{{m|[[#M{{{2|}}}|M]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{n}}}|* {{{n|[[#N{{{2|}}}|N]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{o}}}|* {{{o|[[#O{{{2|}}}|O]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{p}}}|* {{{p|[[#P{{{2|}}}|P]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{q}}}|* {{{q|[[#Q{{{2|}}}|Q]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{r}}}|* {{{r|[[#R{{{2|}}}|R]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{s}}}|* {{{s|[[#S{{{2|}}}|S]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{t}}}|* {{{t|[[#T{{{2|}}}|T]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{u}}}|* {{{u|[[#U{{{2|}}}|U]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{v}}}|* {{{v|[[#V{{{2|}}}|V]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{w}}}|* {{{w|[[#W{{{2|}}}|W]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{x}}}|* {{{x|[[#X{{{2|}}}|X]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{y}}}|* {{{y|[[#Y{{{2|}}}|Y]]}}} }}{{#if:{{{z}}}|* {{{z|[[#Z{{{2|}}}|Z]]}}} }}}} {{#ifeq:{{{nobreak|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|short1|yes}}}}}|yes | | }}{{#if:{{{custom1|{{{Sec1|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom1link|{{{Sec1link|#{{{custom1|{{{Sec1}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom1name|{{{Sec1name|{{{custom1|{{{Sec1}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom2|{{{Sec2|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom2link|{{{Sec2link|#{{{custom2|{{{Sec2}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom2name|{{{Sec2name|{{{custom2|{{{Sec2}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom3|{{{Sec3|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom3link|{{{Sec3link|#{{{custom3|{{{Sec3}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom3name|{{{Sec3name|{{{custom3|{{{Sec3}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom4|{{{Sec4|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom4link|{{{Sec4link|#{{{custom4|{{{Sec4}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom4name|{{{Sec4name|{{{custom4|{{{Sec4}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom5|{{{Sec5|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom5link|{{{Sec5link|#{{{custom5|{{{Sec5}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom5name|{{{Sec5name|{{{custom5|{{{Sec5}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom6|{{{Sec6|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom6link|{{{Sec6link|#{{{custom6|{{{Sec6}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom6name|{{{Sec6name|{{{custom6|{{{Sec6}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom7|{{{Sec7|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom7link|{{{Sec7link|#{{{custom7|{{{Sec7}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom7name|{{{Sec7name|{{{custom7|{{{Sec7}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom8|{{{Sec8|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom8link|{{{Sec8link|#{{{custom8|{{{Sec8}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom8name|{{{Sec8name|{{{custom8|{{{Sec8}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom9|{{{Sec9|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom9link|{{{Sec9link|#{{{custom9|{{{Sec9}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom9name|{{{Sec9name|{{{custom9|{{{Sec9}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom10|{{{Sec10|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom10link|{{{Sec10link|#{{{custom10|{{{Sec10}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom10name|{{{Sec10name|{{{custom10|{{{Sec10}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom11|{{{Sec11|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom11link|{{{Sec11link|#{{{custom11|{{{Sec11}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom11name|{{{Sec11name|{{{custom11|{{{Sec11}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }} {{#if:{{{custom12|{{{Sec12|}}}}}} | * [[{{{custom12link|{{{Sec12link|#{{{custom12|{{{Sec12}}} }}} }}} }}}|{{{custom12name|{{{Sec12name|{{{custom12|{{{Sec12}}} }}} }}} }}}]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{seealso}}}|yes | * [[#See also|See also]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{notesfirst}}}|yes | * [[#Notes|Notes]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{refs|{{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|short1|yes}}}}}|yes | * [[#References|References]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{notes}}}|yes | * [[#Notes|Notes]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{further}}}|yes | * [[#Further reading|Further reading]] }}{{#ifeq:{{{extlinks}}}|yes | * [[#External links|External links]] }}
{{endflatlist}}
